title: Brenda Fletcher
compiled_truth: Brenda Fletcher is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-12-10 to 2001-05-11), Brenda Fletcher sent 13 and received 467 emails, totalling 480 interactions. Top correspondents: [Chris Germany](people/chris-germany) (13), [Dan Junek](people/dan-junek) (2), [Scott Goodell](people/scott-goodell) (2), [Judy Townsend](people/judy-townsend) (1), [Jeanne Wukasch](people/jeanne-wukasch) (1).
